title: Swan Song

startPoint.en: Speak to Herman Caranos at the Piscatoris Fishing Colony.
startPoint.es: Habla con Herman Caranos en Piscatoris Fishing Colony.

items.name: Empty pot
items.display: Empty pot and pot lid (there's a potter's wheel in Draynor if you need it, or the Barbarian Village has everything required to make your own)

items.name: Bones
items.display: 7 bones (can be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Iron bar
items.display: 5 iron bars (can be obtained during the quest, requiring smelting from iron ores)

recommended.name: Eagles' Peak lodestone
recommended.display: Activated Eagles' Peak (or memory strand teleport), Draynor, Port Sarim and Yanille lodestones

recommended.name: Cooking gauntlets
recommended.display: Cooking gauntlets or Cooking cape (Less chance to burn monkfish)

recommended.name: Prayer potion
recommended.display: Prayer restoration such as prayer potions

kills: 10 sea trolls (one each of levels 56/77/84 and seven of level 63)

rewards.name: Piscatoris Fishing Colony
rewards.display: Access to the Piscatoris Fishing Colony Able to fish monkfish Able to use Skeletal mages for training Seaweed spawns Bank and obelisk very close by

rewards.name: Malignius Mortifer
rewards.display: Can get the following items from Malignius Mortifer upon request: Bone seeds (requires pot and pot lid)

rewards.name: Transmutation
rewards.display: Able to transmute raw bass into raw monkfish

rewards.name: Eagle Peak
rewards.display: Eagle Peak (depending on how you walk to Kathy Corkat)

rewards.name: Joy of the Hunt
rewards.display: Joy of the Hunt (if you took Kathy's boat, or walk toward it in the fishing colony)

text.en: Talk to Herman Caranos outside the Piscatoris Fishing Colony (fairy ring code AKQ or memory strand teleport, then run northeast).
text.es: Habla con Herman Caranos fuera de Piscatoris Fishing Colony (código de fairy ring AKQ o teletransporte con memory strand y luego corre hacia el noreste).

text.en: 5 blood runes, 10 mist runes, 10 lava runes
Talk to the Wise Old Man in Draynor.
text.es: Habla con el Wise Old Man en Draynor.

chatOptions: 1 Would you like to go on a quest?

text.en: Combat gear and food
Bring the supplies for the next section to save a trip
Head back to the Piscatoris Colony. Talk to the Wise Old Man.
text.es: Vuelve a Piscatoris Colony. Habla con el Wise Old Man.

text.en: Kill the sea trolls and open the colony gate.
text.es: Mata a los sea trolls y abre la puerta de la colonia.

text.en: Talk to Herman in the eastern building.
text.es: Habla con Herman en el edificio oriental.

text.en: 5 iron bars, 1 log
Cooking gauntlets
Talk to Franklin Caranos near the entrance.
text.es: Habla con Franklin Caranos cerca de la entrada.

text.en: In the building directly north of Franklin, use a log on the firebox, then light the firebox by clicking on it.
text.es: En el edificio situado justo al norte de Franklin, usa un tronco en el firebox y luego enciéndelo haciendo clic sobre él.

text.en: Logs and iron ores can be obtained just outside of the colony. The firebox is the metal box on the east side of the metal press.
text.es: Se pueden obtener troncos y mena de hierro justo a las afueras de la colonia. El firebox es la caja metálica situada en el lado este de la Metal Press.

boldTerms: The firebox is the metal box on the east side of the metal press.

text.en: Use 5 iron bars on the Metal Press to get 5 iron sheets.
text.es: Usa 5 barras de hierro en la Metal Press para obtener 5 iron sheets.

text.en: Use the iron sheets on the broken colony walls to the west.
text.es: Usa las iron sheets en los muros dañados de la colonia, al oeste.

text.en: Talk to Franklin.
text.es: Habla con Franklin.

text.en: Right-click on Arnold Lydspor in the bank to talk to him.
text.es: Haz clic derecho sobre Arnold Lydspor en el banco para hablar con él.

text.en: Catch at least five fresh monkfish to the northwest. You'll be attacked by sea trolls when fishing. This can take up to 10 minutes depending on your Fishing level.
text.es: Pesca al menos cinco monkfish frescos al noroeste. Serás atacado por sea trolls mientras pescas. Esto puede llevar hasta 10 minutos dependiendo de tu nivel de Pesca.

text.en: Cook the monkfish in the kitchen southwest. You will need to turn in five fresh monkfish; if any are burned, fish for more. To cook them, just use them on the range and don't proceed on Make-X interface.
text.es: Cocina los monkfish en la cocina al suroeste. Deberás entregar cinco monkfish frescos; si alguno se quema, pesca más. Para cocinarlos, simplemente úsalos en el range y no continúes en la interfaz de Fabricar-X.

text.en: Talk to Arnold.
text.es: Habla con Arnold.

text.en: 1 pot, 1 pot lid, 7 bones
Bring the supplies for the next section to save a trip
Talk to the Wise Old Man and Herman (furthest building to the east).
text.es: Habla con el Wise Old Man y con Herman (el edificio más alejado, al este).

text.en: Talk to Wizard Frumscone in the basement of the Wizards' Guild in Yanille.
text.es: Habla con Wizard Frumscone en el sótano de Wizards' Guild en Yanille.

chatOptions: 2 I'll see what the necromancer needs me to do.

text.en: Fetch the required supplies now, if you haven't already.
text.es: Consigue ahora los suministros necesarios, si aún no lo has hecho.

text.en: Talk to Malignius Mortifer northwest of Port Sarim near the crossroads.
text.es: Habla con Malignius Mortifer al noroeste de Port Sarim, cerca del cruce de caminos.

chatOptions: 2 I need help with saving a fishing colony.

text.en: Talk to any Almost Master Crafter inside the Crafting Guild until one talks to you about crafting pot lids.
text.es: Habla con cualquier Almost Master Crafter dentro de Crafting Guild hasta que uno te hable sobre fabricar tapas de olla.

text.en: Talk to Malignius Mortifer, he will teleport you to the colony, so gear up before speaking with him.
text.es: Habla con Malignius Mortifer; te teletransportará a la colonia, así que equípate bien antes de hablar con él.

chatOptions: 2 I've spoken to the master crafter...

text.en: Combat gear and food
Talk to Herman.
text.es: Habla con Herman.

text.en: Kill the Sea Troll Queen.
text.es: Mata a la Sea Troll Queen.

text.en: Banks recover health rapidly, and while the bank isn't functional until quest completion, you can run into the building and next to the banker to recover health.
text.es: Los bancos recuperan la vida rápidamente, y aunque el banco no esté operativo hasta completar la misión, puedes correr al edificio y colocarte junto al banquero para recuperar vida.

text.en: Talk to Herman.
text.es: Habla con Herman.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
